market.newsText:
1. Average US long-term mortgage rate climbs to 6.53%, highest level in nine months - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos [Abcnews.com]
2. With Caesars Deal, Tilman Fertitta Doubles Down on Vegas Comeback - WSJ [The Wall Street Journal]
3. Michael Dell courted Trump early. His company has reaped rewards - CNBC [CNBC]
4. SpaceX Lowers IPO Valuation Target to at Least $1.8 Trillion - Bloomberg.com [Bloomberg]
5. 3-year-old California girl hospitalized with acute kidney failure after eating at Costa Mesa spot amid E. coli outbreak, lawsuit claims - Yahoo [New York Post]
6. Asia markets rise as investors weigh Iran military activity against signs of temporary U.S.-Iran deal - CNBC [CNBC]
7. Meta’s mass layoffs hit nearly 3,200 Bay Area workers, among region’s worst job losses in years - San Francisco Chronicle [San Francisco Chronicle]
8. The seller of a $2.9 million San Francisco home is accepting payment in Anthropic or OpenAI stock - Business Insider [Business Insider]
9. Stock Market Today: Oil Pares Gains as Investors Cling to Hope of Mideast Deal - WSJ [The Wall Street Journal]
10. IBM, Red Hat Pledge $5 Billion for AI-Driven Open Source Security Initiative - WSJ [The Wall Street Journal]
market.label: MORNING SESSION

brief.headline: Retail Blind Spot in Crypto Rally
brief.signal: Bullish tilt with a significant edge on mispricing.
brief.eli5: Retail traders are missing the crypto surge while big players bet big. The market thinks Bitcoin is safe, but the real risk lies elsewhere.
brief.analyst: Retail sentiment is skewed—what they see is a false calm, hiding a deeper volatility.
brief.chaos_line: A world where most investors are sleeping while the markets shift overnight.

plays.thesis: Bet on the direction, not the noise
plays.details: Leverage macro trends to control risk.

plays.thesis: Go big when the crowd is wrong

plays.details: See what others miss in this rally.

brief.trap: The biggest danger isn't the market—it's the people assuming stability.
brief.edge: They're only looking at the surface, not the storm beneath.
brief.time_sensitivity: Today's moves could reshape the entire sector.

news_wires.title: Iran deal hopes lift markets, oil stalls
news_wires.impact: Risk premium compresses as investors price a tentative U.S.-Iran agreement, boosting the DXY and easing 10Y yields. Oil prices retreat, supporting SPX and risk assets while BTC sees modest upside from reduced geopolitical stress.

news_wires.title: Dell smashes Q1, AI outlook raised
news_wires.impact: Dell's earnings beat fuels a rally in US tech equities, lifting SPX and pulling risk appetite higher; AI hype spills into related chips and cloud stocks, pressuring the DXY lower. Short‑term yield curve steadies as cash flows into equities.

news_wires.title: US 30‑yr mortgage rate hits 6.53%
news_wires.impact: Higher long‑term mortgage rates signal tighter credit conditions, nudging 10Y Treasury yields up and strengthening the DXY. Housing‑sensitive REITs and consumer discretionary stocks face pressure, while BTC may see a modest inflow as investors seek non‑correlated assets.
